title: CMD.BSP.001.TIE.CONFIRM_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE — Confirm prescriber override after arbitration validation
description: Payload of the CONFIRM_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE command. Issued by POL.BSP.001.TIE.ON_ARBITRATION_OVERRIDE_VALIDATED, handled by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE. No bus event is emitted — the arbitration validation is already published by ARB. Idempotent on trigger.event_id over a 30-day window.

override_id.description: Identifier of the override being confirmed. Must match the active override on the aggregate.

event_id.description: IDEMPOTENCY KEY. Identifier of the upstream BNK.RLVR.RVT.ARBITRATION_OVERRIDE_VALIDATED event.

validated_at.description: Timestamp at which BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB validated the override (ISO-8601, UTC).
